spec.precondition: requires valid(galloc) && valid(graph) && valid(node_buffer_ids) && valid(leaf_buffer_ids) && valid_range(sizes, 0, galloc->n_buffers) && galloc->n_buffers > 0 && ggml_gallocr_reserve_n_impl(galloc, graph, node_buffer_ids, leaf_buffer_ids, true) == true
spec.postcondition: (ensures forall i in 0..galloc->n_buffers: sizes[i] == sum of max_size of all chunks in galloc->buf_tallocs[i]) && (forall i in 0..galloc->n_buffers: sizes[i] == sum(galloc->buf_tallocs[i]->chunks[0..galloc->buf_tallocs[i]->n_chunks].map(|c| c->max_size)))
